law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTING OF BODILY INJURY.

Art. 398. Whoever intentionally inflicts wounds or blows shall be punished with imprisonment from eight days to six months and with a fine of twenty-six [euros] to one hundred [euros] or with one of these punishments alone.  
If the offender acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment from one month to one year and to a fine of fifty [euros] to two hundred [euros].

Art. 399. If the blows or wounds cause an illness or incapacity to perform personal labor, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from two months to two years and with a fine of fifty [euros] to two hundred [euros].  
The offender shall be punished with imprisonment from six months to three years and with a fine of one hundred [euros] to five hundred [euros], if he acted with premeditation.

Art. 400. The punishment is imprisonment from two years to five years and a fine of two hundred [euros] to five hundred [euros], if the blows or wounds cause an incurable seeming disease, incapacity to perform personal labor for more than four months, complete loss of use of an organ, or a severe mutilation.  
The penalty is imprisonment from five years to ten years, in case the offender acted with premeditation.

Art. 401. When the blows or wounds are intentionally inflicted, but without the purpose of killing, and yet cause death, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from five years to ten years.  
He shall be punished with imprisonment from ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  intentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows: Person -> Bool
  actsWithPremeditation: Person -> Bool
  causesIllnessOrIncapacity: Person -> Bool
  causesIncurableSeemingDisease: Person -> Bool
  incapacityMoreThanFourMonths: Person -> Bool
  causesCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan: Person -> Bool
  causesSevereMutilation: Person -> Bool
  causesDeath: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt398: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt399: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt400: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt401: Person -> Bool
  imprisonmentMinDays: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Person -> Int
  fineMinEuro: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEuro: Person -> Int
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person:
    punishedArt398(p) <=>
      intentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) &
      ~causesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) &
      ~causesIncurableSeemingDisease(p) &
      ~incapacityMoreThanFourMonths(p) &
      ~causesCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan(p) &
      ~causesSevereMutilation(p) &
      ~causesDeath(p).

  ! p in Person:
    punishedArt399(p) <=>
      intentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) &
      causesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) &
      ~causesIncurableSeemingDisease(p) &
      ~incapacityMoreThanFourMonths(p) &
      ~causesCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan(p) &
      ~causesSevereMutilation(p) &
      ~causesDeath(p).

  ! p in Person:
    punishedArt400(p) <=>
      intentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) &
      (causesIncurableSeemingDisease(p) |
       incapacityMoreThanFourMonths(p) |
       causesCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan(p) |
       causesSevereMutilation(p)) &
      ~causesDeath(p).

  ! p in Person:
    punishedArt401(p) <=>
      intentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) &
      causesDeath(p).

  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 30.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 8.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 60.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 180.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 730.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 3650.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 180.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 365.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 730.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1095.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1825.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 5475.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuro(p) = 26.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuro(p) = 50.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuro(p) = 50.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuro(p) = 100.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuro(p) = 200.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMinEuro(p) = 200.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p)) => fineMinEuro(p) = 0.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuro(p) = 100.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt398(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuro(p) = 200.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuro(p) = 200.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt399(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuro(p) = 500.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & ~actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuro(p) = 500.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt400(p) & actsWithPremeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuro(p) = 500.
  ! p in Person:
    (punishedArt401(p)) => fineMaxEuro(p) = 0.
}

case.text: Jan and Marie work in the same office. After an argument, Jan waits for Marie in the parking lot and deliberately hits her with a stick. Marie breaks her arm and has to stay home for four weeks; she cannot perform her work. Jan acted with premeditation: he had brought the stick and waited for her. The injuries did not cause any incurable disease or loss of organ.

pipeline.natural_language: No. Jan is not punished under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
Yes. Jan is punished under Article 399.

questions.text: What is the minimum prison sentence for Jan?

pipeline.natural_language: The minimum prison sentence for Jan is 180 days.
